titleStmt.title: SII 16.309: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 309. (A.R. No. 564 of 1915.) SIDDHAVAṬAM, SIDDHAVATAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: At the entrance, on the east wall of the old fort.
This is dated Śaka 1527, (also expressed by chronogram aśva-aṁbaka-bāṇa-bhū) Viśvāvasu, corresponding to 1605 A.D.

It states that the Maṭḷa chief Ananta constructed the fortifications round the town of Siddhavaṭam which had been caputured by his father Ellama Rāju, after defeating in dattle, the chief Koṇḍrāju Tirupati Rāju. Ananta who belonged to the Dēvachōda family claims his descent from the solar race. He bore the titles Manne-Haṁvīra and Rāchabebbuli. Among his achievements described at length are mentioned his victory in the battle of Jaṁbulamaḍaka (i.e. Jammalamaḍugu) and the capture of Cuttack. He is praised as the right hand of the Karṇāṭa emperor (i.e. the Vijayanagara king) and as the author of the Kakutsthavijayamu and other works. He is also stated to have constructed a tank in the name of his father.
The inscription commences with a Sanskrit verse followed by six verses in Telugu. See Sources of Vijayanagara History, pp. 248-50. Published in the Epigraphia Indica, Vol. XXXVII, pp. 103 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śākē svāṁ(śvāṁ)bakabāṇabhūparimitē varṣē ca viśvāvasā . vaunnatyēna cirā yuṣā ca guṇabhājācaṁdratāraṁ bhuvi . yasyānaṁttanṛpēṇa tēna janakēnai vōṭukūrī raṇē prāptassiddhavaṭōyamu
jvalasilāsālō viśālaḥ kṛtaḥ . śālivāhananāma śakava¨rṣamulu vēyi sēnūṁṭi yiruvadiyēḍu canina . viśvāvasu vanaṁggavelayu vatsaramuna sakalahiṁdūrājya sārvabhauma .
vīra veṁkaṭarāyavibhuṁḍu caṁdragirīṁdrasīmasāṁmrājyaṁbbu sēyunapuḍu . bhānuvaṁśāṁ bhōjabhānuṁḍaṁbhōrāśi gaṁbhīruṁḍai varagaṁḍḍamū¨rtti . 1 . bhirudasāmajasiṁha bhīmakētana bha¨rta dēvacōḍānvaya bhūvi
bhuṁḍu . raṇabhūbalībhūta rāvela velikoṁḍḍa veṁkaṭādri mahīśavīravaruṁḍu . jaṁbbula maḍaka bhūsaṁgrāma jayaśāli kaṭakapurīcūrakārahāri . naṁddelakriṣṇama naranāthabhayadāna dakṣadō¨rddaṁ
ḍa vicakṣaṇuṁḍu . 2 . Akhilaka¨rnāṭasiṁhāsanādhīśvara dakṣiṇabāhābhidhānadhāri . vida ḷa(ḷi)ta koṁḍrāju veṁkkaṭādri vibhuṁḍu ceṁnnūriharaṇasaṁppannagṛhuṁḍu . vibudhastuta kakusthavijayaprabaṁdhādikāvya nibi(ba)ṁ
dhana graṁthaka¨rta . śrīmadellamarājuceruvu pēra taṭākaghaṭanānubhāvasaṁghaṭitayaśuṁḍu . 3 . draviḍabhū madhurādi dhāṭī caladraya balarakṣaṇākṣīṇa bāhubaluṁḍu . penugoṁḍḍa samara yāvana pāduśā
ga¨rvakha¨rvīkaraṇacaṇākha¨rvabhujuṁḍu . raṁggamāṁbbākumāravataṁsaratnaṁbbu parabhīma birudula bhāyibaṁḍḍi . vimatāvanīśvaravēśyābhujaṁgguṁḍḍu ballaragaṁḍāṁkabhāsuruṁḍu . 4 . mannehaṁvvīruṁ
ḍu magalarāyaṁḍu rācabebbuli pararājabhīkaruṁḍu . maṭli tiruveṁggaḷamānavā dhiparatnaratnākaruṁ ḍanaṁttarājaśauri . tama taṁḍri yallabhūramaṇuṁḍu koṁḍrāju tirupatirājupaiṁ bherigikoṭṭi
tana kattimōnaṁdeccukonina sidhavaṭaṁbu celaṁga danapēra peddaceruvu sēse . 5 . hṛdaya muppoṁga siddavaṭēśvarunaku . Aupacārikamaina sālāṁttaramuga puramucuṭṭu nā
varaṇamai pariṇamiṁppa . dhātriṁ gaṭṭiṁcce nācaṁdrātārakamuga . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.309 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
